current_form.value: Liverpool captain (third season as skipper). The only outfield player to feature for every minute of any team's 2025-26 Premier League campaign; became the oldest outfield player in PL history to play every minute of a season (passing John Terry), aged 34y 320d on the final day. Turns 35 in July 2026.

fitness.value: Fully fit; played every minute of Liverpool's league season. Named in the Netherlands World Cup squad.

wc_role.value: Captains the Netherlands at the World Cup; in Ronald Koeman's 26-man squad (named ~27 May 2026). Captained the side for a record 72nd time vs Lithuania on 17 Nov 2025 (passing Frank de Boer). Widely expected to be his final international tournament. Netherlands in Group F with Japan, Sweden and Tunisia; open vs Japan on 14 June in Dallas.

records.value: Most appearances as Netherlands captain (72+, passing Frank de Boer). Oldest outfield player to play every minute of a Premier League season (34y 320d).
